channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Four key takeaways from the FIFA World Cup as knockout round begins
item.description: Despite early concerns, the North American World Cup has delivered excitement as the knockout stage approaches.

item.title: July 4th fireworks in Washington: what's different for America's 250th
item.description: This year's fireworks display in Washington, D.C., marks the nation's 250th birthday with special programming.

item.title: Economists debate whether new student loan limits will reduce tuition costs
item.description: The theory linking federal loans to college pricing has existed for decades, but the evidence remains uncertain.

item.title: Food defined social hierarchy in 1776. Here's what was on the table
item.description: At the time of the U.S. founding, American diets included Parmesan ice cream and terrapin, but meals varied by social status.
